calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Tatus Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-24-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated March 10, 2006 is admitted to probate. Michael Tsui is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for April 12, 2027 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Shirly Yawitz is appointed Probate Referee.

Judge: Lydia Villarreal. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
